utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 of these items: destination is Rome, Italy; travel_dates are specified; transportation includes flight details and total cost; accommodation includes hotel details and costs; activities are listed with costs; additional_services include dining allowance and insurance; total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown. All fields are fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Rome, Italy', which corresponds to a rating of 8 in the ground-truth data. The transportation is described as a 'budget airline, economy class' flight, which matches 'budget_airlines -> Economy Class' with a rating of 6. The accommodation selected is 'Tranquil Inn', which has a rating of 7. The activities include 'walking tour', 'museum entry', and 'culinary experience' — these correspond to 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9), 'Museum Day Pass' (rating 10), and 'Cooking Class' (rating 10) respectively. Therefore, we map each chosen element to its respective rating.
